name: Tool Calling
description: Evaluates tool/function calling quality: selection, argument quality, reasoning, and error handling.

perspectives.name: Tool Selection
perspectives.description: Did the model select the appropriate tool(s) for the task?
perspectives.systemPrompt: You are an expert evaluator assessing whether an AI correctly selected the appropriate tools for a given task. Evaluate whether the chosen tools are the right ones for the request.

perspectives.name: Argument Quality
perspectives.description: Are the tool arguments correct and well-formed?
perspectives.systemPrompt: You are an expert evaluator assessing the quality of tool call arguments. Evaluate whether the arguments passed to tools are correct, complete, and properly formatted.

perspectives.name: Reasoning
perspectives.description: Does the model show good reasoning about when and how to use tools?
perspectives.systemPrompt: You are an expert evaluator assessing the reasoning behind tool usage. Evaluate whether the model demonstrates clear logical reasoning about which tools to use and in what sequence.

perspectives.name: Error Handling
perspectives.description: Does the model handle edge cases and potential errors gracefully?
perspectives.systemPrompt: You are an expert evaluator assessing how well an AI handles error conditions and edge cases when using tools. Evaluate whether the model anticipates and handles potential errors appropriately.
